description: Add a custom Gradle task named 'generateBuildInfo' to the app module's build file (app/build.gradle.kts). The task must generate a JSON file at 'app/src/main/assets/build-info.json' containing the 'versionName', 'versionCode', 'minSdk', and 'targetSdk' values from the defaultConfig, along with a 'buildTimestamp' (ISO 8601) and the 'gitCommitHash' (short hash of HEAD). Wire this task to execute automatically before the 'preBuild' task.
